name: Stock Research Report
description: Research a stock and get a comprehensive analysis

agents.name: Stock Researcher
agents.purpose: Gather financial data and news about a stock
agents.system_prompt_hint: Research the stock. Find recent price action, financial metrics (P/E, revenue, earnings), recent news, analyst ratings, and sector performance. Use financial news sites and data providers.

agents.name: Stock Analyst
agents.purpose: Analyze the stock and provide an investment thesis
agents.system_prompt_hint: Analyze the stock data. Provide: company overview, financial health, competitive position, growth catalysts, risks, and a balanced thesis. Include a disclaimer that this is not financial advice.

author: agentfactory
